hero.name: Andrea López Palomeque
hero.statement1: I build digital spaces for people who care deeply about their craft.
hero.statement2: Architects, engineers, makers — your work speaks for itself in person.
hero.statement3: Online, it deserves the same intention.
hero.label: Frontend Developer · Buenos Aires

elGranPeon.description: Full brand identity and e-commerce platform for an Argentine leather goods brand — from visual language to a store that feels as crafted as the product itself.

cruzarDeportes.description: Full e-commerce platform for an Argentine sports apparel brand — a curated storefront for football jerseys and team gear from leagues around the world.

arqAgustinaCarbajal.description: Portfolio website for architect Agustina Carbajal — a gallery-like digital space with bilingual support, designed to feel like walking through rooms of her work rather than scrolling a page.

textTheCheck.description: Product design and development for an AI-powered WhatsApp bot that reads receipts and splits expenses — turning a messy problem into a clean, instant interaction.

gastoObra.description: Product design and development for an AI-powered construction tracker — taking the chaos of a job site and turning it into a clean, real-time expense dashboard that builders and clients can both trust.

routeAI.description: Product design and development for an AI-powered route planner — describe your stops in plain words, and Gemini figures out the optimal order and opens Google Maps with everything pre-filled.

manifesto.line1: Your brand should feel like a natural extension of
manifesto.line2: Not a template. Not a grid of Instagram posts.
manifesto.supporting: I help independent professionals — architects, engineers, makers — show the world how serious and beautiful their work really is.

about.bio1: I'm a frontend developer based in Buenos Aires with 4+ years building for startups and independent brands. I work across the JavaScript ecosystem — React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt, TypeScript, and Tailwind — but what sets me apart is that I think like a designer and care like a founder.
about.bio2Before: I've built e-commerce platforms, AI-powered WhatsApp bots, and brand identities from scratch. Currently co-founding
about.bio2After: with Imanol, building AI-first solutions for small businesses.

contact.heading: Let's talk
contact.subheading: Have a project, a brand, or an idea? I'd love to hear about it.

dev.pageSubtitle: Work history, tech stack, and projects with code.
dev.privateRepoBadge: 🔒 Private repo — architecture walkthrough on request

wiseutils.description: Co-founded a software studio building AI-first products for small and medium businesses. Work spans RAG systems with vector search, Anthropic Claude integrations, custom retrieval pipelines, and agentic workflows — alongside e-commerce platforms, inventory tools, and conversational interfaces.

meowtel.description: Owned frontend web development, building and iterating on key user-facing sections. Contributed to A/B testing, implemented analytics and tracking, and optimized Core Web Vitals. Participated in the gradual migration of selected components from a Vue-based SPA to React and Next.js for performance and SEO.

asteroid.description: Web development using React.js, Next.js, Firebase. Collaborated with UX/UI designers on company website and new projects including Hablalo back office.

telco.description: Developed Wee! Pagos payment app and Wee!pas ticketing app using React and Next.js. Built Recolector mobile app from scratch in React Native.

ideaRadar.description: Private knowledge platform that turns curated content into a queryable second brain. Captured links and notes are embedded with Voyage AI and stored in Postgres + pgvector; natural-language questions trigger semantic retrieval and are answered by Claude through a custom RAG pipeline. Built as a single Nuxt 3 + TypeScript app on Supabase (auth + Postgres + pgvector), deployed on Vercel.

textTheCheck.description: WhatsApp-first financial companion that turns receipts and freeform Spanish text into structured expense data through a natural-language extraction pipeline (Gemini AI) over a Nuxt + Express stack. Dual modes for collaborative trip splitting and personal tracking.

gastoObra.description: Construction expense management platform. Site teams log expenses through a natural-language pipeline (Gemini AI) on WhatsApp, and a web dashboard surfaces real-time insights and financial reports for builders and clients.

elGranPeon.description: Full brand identity and e-commerce platform for an Argentine artisanal goods brand. Customer-facing storefront plus complete back-office for inventory management and stock control.

cruzarDeportes.description: E-commerce platform for sports jerseys and apparel. Features product catalog, shopping cart, advanced search & filtering, and admin management tools.

arqAgustinaCarbajal.description: Architect portfolio with gallery-like spatial design, bilingual support (ES/EN), room-based color transitions, and scroll-reveal animations. Built as a brand experience for Agustina Carbajal.

instalarPro.description: Platform connecting AC technicians with clients in Argentina/LATAM. Three interconnected domains: technician landing pages, back-office dashboard, and client booking.

routeAI.description: Natural language route planner PWA. Users describe their stops by text or voice; Gemini AI extracts, orders, and optimizes them, then opens Google Maps with everything pre-filled. Built as a Nuxt 4 + Express monorepo with server-side AI calls to keep API keys secure.

roadToToefl.description: TOEFL exam prep app with word completion, reading comprehension, listening exercises, speaking prompts, and writing tasks.

seo.homeTitle: Andrea López Palomeque — Digital spaces for people who care about their craft
seo.homeDescription: I build digital spaces for people who care deeply about their craft. Frontend developer and brand thinker based in Buenos Aires.
